name: Jimmy Lee Tillman II
bio: Jimmy Lee Tillman II is an author from Illinois running as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in the 2026 primary to fill Dick Durbin's retiring seat. No campaign finance data is publicly reported for Tillman in the December 2025 FEC filing period, suggesting either very limited fundraising or a very recently filed candidacy. He is one of the lower-tier candidates in the Republican field. Very limited public profile documented.

jacket.note: No campaign finance figures reported in Wikipedia's December 2025 FEC table. Data may be unavailable or below reporting threshold.

career_history.highlight: Listed in Wikipedia as 'author'; no further career detail available.
